./novamind-operation python-c '
import novamind_api as nm
queries={
"ledger":"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>=71 AND day<=77 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category",
"subs_week":"SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_channel, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.start_day>=71 AND s.start_day<=77 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_channel,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_channel,s.plan,s.status",
"active_mix":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"active\" GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan",
"issues":"SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, MIN(i.created_day) min_day, MAX(i.created_day) max_day, ROUND(AVG(77-i.created_day),2) avg_age FROM issues i JOIN customers c ON i.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE i.resolved_day IS NULL GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY n DESC",
"resolved":"SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(i.resolved_day-i.created_day),2) avg_days FROM issues i JOIN customers c ON i.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE i.resolved_day>=71 AND i.resolved_day<=77 GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY n DESC"
}
for name,q in queries.items():
    print("--",name)
    r=nm.query(q)
    for row in r["rows"]: print(row)
'

*** Update File: /modal-volume/saas-bench/codex_agent_runs/run_ec0ced22/agent_workspace/sim_notes.md
@@
 Day 70 / Week 10 observations:
 - Cash slipped only $11.5k while subscribers grew to 4,366, so the model is close to crossing into positive weekly cash flow.
 - S2 content marketing remains the best channel: 918 paid subscribers from 2,244 leads, with strong B/C uptake even after the price increase. S1 referral is still profitable but lower ARPU and more support-sensitive.
 - Open issues rose to 382, still same-day, while ops resolved 2,050 issues. Social posts still mention delayed support, so capacity must stay ahead of growth.
 - Competitor posts showed two quality boosts around day 69/70, raising the risk that current expectations drift faster than low global dev can offset.

+
+Day 77 / Week 11 observations:
+- Cash fell to $146k because subscription payments ($124k) did not cover the $170k+ weekly operating base after the support/dev increase.
+- S2 content marketing still works: 612 paid content subscribers from 2,237 leads, with 207 B and 233 C users. S1 referral collapsed to only 3 paid subscribers from 186 leads, so S1 paid acquisition should stop.
+- Cancellations rose to 31, mostly low-ARPU S1 A users, while S2 cancellations stayed modest. S2 remains the economic center.
+- Open issues remain same-day, and resolved issues averaged 1 day; support complaints persist socially, but the spend level can be trimmed while retaining S2 coverage.
+- Week 11 adjustment: stop S1 ads, keep S2 content, reduce global/S1 ops burn, keep meaningful S2 support/dev, raise B/C list prices modestly, and publish concrete support throughput metrics.
*** End Patch

import novamind_api as nm
queries={
"ledger":"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>=78 AND day<=84 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category",
"ad_leads":"SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=78 AND day<=84 GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY channel_id,group_id",
"subs_week":"SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.start_day>=78 AND s.start_day<=84 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status",

"cancels":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day>=78 AND s.end_day<=84 GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY n DESC"

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c '
import novamind_api as nm
queries={
"ledger":"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>=127 AND day<=133 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category",
"ad_leads":"SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=127 AND day<=133 GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY channel_id,group_id",
"subs_week":"SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.start_day>=127 AND s.start_day<=133 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status",
"active_mix":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan",
"cancels":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day>=127 AND s.end_day<=133 GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY n DESC"
}
for name,q in queries.items():
    print("--",name)
    r=nm.query(q)
    for row in r["rows"]: print(row)
'

"ledger":"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>=148 AND day<=154 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category",
"ad_leads":"SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=148 AND day<=154 GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY channel_id,group_id",
"subs_week":"SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.start_day>=148 AND s.start_day<=154 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status",
"active_mix":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan",
"cancels":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day>=148 AND s.end_day<=154 GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY n DESC"
}
for name,q in queries.items():

    r=nm.query(q)
    for row in r["rows"]: print(row)
'

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c '
import novamind_api as nm
queries={
"ledger":"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category",
"ad_leads":"SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=176 AND day<=182 GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY channel_id,group_id",
"subs_week":"SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.start_day>=176 AND s.start_day<=182 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status",
"active_mix":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan",
"cancels":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day>=176 AND s.end_day<=182 GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY n DESC"
}
for name,q in queries.items():
    print("--",name)
    r=nm.query(q)
    for row in r["rows"]: print(row)
'

import novamind_api as nm
queries={
"ledger":"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt FROM ledger WHERE day>=197 AND day<=203 GROUP BY category ORDER BY category",
"ad_leads":"SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) leads, ROUND(SUM(spend),2) spend FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE day>=197 AND day<=203 GROUP BY channel_id,group_id ORDER BY channel_id,group_id",
"subs_week":"SELECT c.group_id, c.acquisition_source, s.plan, s.status, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.start_day>=197 AND s.start_day<=203 GROUP BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,c.acquisition_source,s.plan,s.status",
"active_mix":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"subscribed\" GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY c.group_id,s.plan",
"cancels":"SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(s.effective_price),2) avg_price FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c ON s.customer_id=c.customer_id WHERE s.status=\"cancelled\" AND s.end_day>=197 AND s.end_day<=203 GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan ORDER BY n DESC"
}

arguments._raw:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /modal-volume/saas-bench/codex_agent_runs/run_ec0ced22/agent_workspace/sim_notes.md
@@
 Day 217 / Week 31 observations:
 - Tier-6 R&D completed for a large +0.5559 quality boost. Tier-7 and tier-8 remain in progress.
 - A tier-2 worked: cancellations fell from 4,138 to 738 while cash recovered to $1.6M.
 - Operating margin improved, but support is still unresolved: S2 issue age rose to 4.77 days and social keeps asking for real MTTR data.
 - Paid content at $3k/day still added 2,914 subscribers, but network effects added 6,109 subscribers. We can cut ads further without stopping growth.
 - Week 31 adjustment: wait one more week on tier-9 R&D for cash buffer, reduce paid S2 ads to a maintenance level, increase S2 support coverage again, and post actual resolved-issue/MTTR-style metrics.
+
+Day 224 / Week 32 observations:
+- Cash reached $2.04M and cancellations fell to 533. Issue backlog also dropped, so the retention reset is working.
+- 401 enterprise leads appeared with 243,566 total seats. Sent all open leads three month-to-month options with volume pricing: E1 $9/$15/$24, E2 $12/$22/$35, E3 $15/$30/$50 for A/B/C.
+- Individual growth is now mostly network-led, so keep S2 paid content at maintenance level.
+- Tier-7 and tier-8 R&D remain in progress. Tier-9 is now affordable, and possible enterprise conversion could create a large capacity step.
+- Week 32 adjustment: start tier-9 R&D, upgrade to tier-6 capacity ahead of enterprise decisions, keep support/dev/acquisition stable, and post an enterprise SLA readiness message.
*** End Patch

./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
q='''WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT e.customer_id, c.group_id, e.seat_count FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id WHERE e.sender='system' ORDER BY e.customer_id'''
rows=nm.query(q)['rows']
prices={
 'E1': [['A',7.0], ['B',12.0], ['C',20.0]],
 'E2': [['A',9.0], ['B',17.0], ['C',28.0]],
 'E3': [['A',12.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',42.0]],
}
deals=[[r['customer_id'], prices.get(r['group_id'], [['A',8.0], ['B',15.0], ['C',25.0]])] for r in rows]
print({'new_threads_to_answer': len(deals), 'total_seats': sum(r['seat_count'] or 0 for r in rows)})
if deals:
    res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
    ok=sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))
    print({'sent': ok, 'results': res.get('summary', res)})
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=60000, development=12000))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 100000, 'S1': 5000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 18000}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing': {'S2': 1000}}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind reliability update: no outage this week, lower latency, fewer open issues, and tier-6 capacity online for larger deployments now evaluating production rollout.'))"

./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
q='''WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT e.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, e.seat_count AS seats FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id WHERE e.sender='system' ORDER BY e.customer_id'''
rows=nm.query(q)['rows']
prices={
 'E1': [['A',7.0], ['B',12.0], ['C',20.0]],
 'E2': [['A',9.0], ['B',17.0], ['C',28.0]],
 'E3': [['A',12.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',42.0]],
}
deals=[[r['customer_id'], prices.get(r['group_id'], [['A',8.0], ['B',15.0], ['C',25.0]])] for r in rows]
print({'new_threads_to_answer': len(deals), 'total_seats': sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in rows)})
if deals:
 res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
 print({'sent': sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))})
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=50000, development=12000))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 75000, 'S1': 5000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 18000}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing': {'S2': 1000}}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind roadmap update: tier-10 architecture work is funded, tier-6 capacity is live, and enterprise evaluations now include clearer pricing plus reliability benchmarks.'))
print({'cash': nm.vars.cash, 'day': nm.vars.current_day})"

+- Cash recovered to $2.00M despite tier-9 R&D, and individual subs crossed 100k. Cancellations stayed controlled at 566, though backlog rose from 2,945 to 3,497 after the support trim.
+- Enterprise leads still have not converted, but group insights show slow decision cycles: E2 averages 16.3 days and E3 23.8 days, so the first large cohorts may still be evaluating.

+- Week 34 adjustment: keep tier-6 capacity and product settings stable, reduce global ops to $50k/day and S2 targeted ops to $75k/day to protect cash after tier-10, keep S2 dev and maintenance content spend, and post a roadmap/reliability update.
*** End Patch

## novamind

Entry point for novamind CLI.

Commands:
    register-daily-script   Register a script to run daily
    list-daily-scripts      List all registered daily scripts
    remove-daily-script     Remove a registered daily script

Examples:
    novamind register-daily-script strategy.py
    novamind list-daily-scripts
    novamind remove-daily-script strategy.py


### Commands

#### `novamind register-daily-script`

Register a Python script to run automatically at the start of each day.

The script content is snapshotted at registration time. Subsequent edits
to the source file will NOT affect the registered version. To update,
re-register the script.

If a script with the same filename already exists, it is overwritten.
Scripts are executed in alphabetical order at the start of each day,
with novamind_api pre-imported.

Args:
    script_path: Path to the Python script to register.

Example:
    novamind register-daily-script my_strategy.py

#### `novamind list-daily-scripts`

List all registered daily scripts.

Shows script names and sizes. Scripts run at the start of each day
in alphabetical order.

Example:
    novamind list-daily-scripts

#### `novamind remove-daily-script`

Remove a registered daily script.

Args:
    script_name: Filename of the script to remove.

Example:
    novamind remove-daily-script my_strategy.py

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
q='''WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT e.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, e.seat_count AS seats FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id WHERE e.sender='system' ORDER BY e.customer_id'''
rows=nm.query(q)['rows']
prices={
 'E1': [['A',10.0], ['B',18.0], ['C',30.0]],
 'E2': [['A',18.0], ['B',40.0], ['C',70.0]],
 'E3': [['A',25.0], ['B',55.0], ['C',90.0]],
}
deals=[[r['customer_id'], prices.get(r['group_id'], [['A',10.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',45.0]])] for r in rows]
print({'new_threads_to_answer': len(deals), 'total_seats': sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in rows)})
if deals:
 res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
 print({'sent': sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))})
print(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=59, B=149, C=179))
print(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4))
print(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=50000, B=200000, C=750000))
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=80000, development=5000))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 250000, 'S1': 10000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 10000}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing': {'S2': 1000}}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind retention update: B/C pricing is returning to prior levels, quotas are expanding, and support capacity is being increased to work down the S2 backlog.'))"

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
# Answer current enterprise leads first.
q='''WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT e.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, e.seat_count AS seats FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id WHERE e.sender='system' ORDER BY e.customer_id'''
rows=nm.query(q)['rows']
prices={
 'E1': [['A',10.0], ['B',18.0], ['C',30.0]],
 'E2': [['A',18.0], ['B',40.0], ['C',70.0]],
 'E3': [['A',25.0], ['B',55.0], ['C',90.0]],
}
deals=[[r['customer_id'], prices.get(r['group_id'], [['A',10.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',45.0]])] for r in rows]
print({'new_threads_to_answer': len(deals), 'total_seats': sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in rows)})
if deals:
 res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
 print({'sent': sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))})
# Small market discovery batch while cash is positive.
for i in range(5):
 try:
  print('market_research', i+1, nm.market.research_market())
 except Exception as e:
  print('market_research_error', i+1, type(e).__name__, e)
# Keep retention recovery package stable.
print(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=59, B=149, C=179))
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(by_group_plan={'S2': {'A': 10.0, 'B': 20.0, 'C': 20.0}}))
print(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=3, C=4))
print(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=75000, B=250000, C=750000))
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=100000, development=5000))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 350000, 'S1': 10000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 10000}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={'content_marketing': {'S2': 1000}}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind retention work continues: S2 credits, higher A-tier quality, larger quotas, and expanded support remain in place while new markets are evaluated.'))"

 Day 322 / Week 46 observations:
 - Cash fell to $3.33M under the heavy retention package, but subscribers still grew to 124,037. Cancellations rose to 4,605, mostly S2 A, and open issues fell slightly to 7,525.
 - Tier-12 remains unaffordable with a safe buffer. Hold off until cash is above the cost plus at least one week of support burn.
 - 1,110 new enterprise leads arrived with 582,447 seats, including D_E02 and D_E09. Sent all current system-latest threads offers. Enterprise still has 0 seats and should not drive spending decisions.
 - Week 46 adjustment: keep the retention package stable for one more week (S2 credits, A3/B3/C4, 75k/250k/750k quotas, global ops $100k/day, S2 ops $350k/day, low dev, S2 content maintenance) and watch cash/backlog closely.
+
+Day 329 / Week 47 observations:
+- Cash fell to $1.82M and open issues rose to 8,291. Subscribers were roughly flat at 124,280. Cancellations rose to 5,953, with S2 A, B, and C all material.
+- Current support spend is too high for the cash result, and the backlog is not falling. Need preserve cash while keeping the core retention levers: A tier 3, expanded quotas, and S2 credits.
+- 999 new enterprise leads were reported, but the latest-thread query found 2,109 system-latest rows. The send call accepted 999, matching the dashboard; treat the rest as stale/non-actionable. Enterprise remains 0 seats.
+- Week 47 adjustment: cut support to global ops $60k/day plus S2 ops $180k/day and S1 $5k/day, pause global and targeted dev, stop S2 content ad spend, reduce S2 B/C credits to $10 while keeping A credit $10, and hold A3/B3/C4 with large quotas.
*** End Patch

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
q='''WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT e.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, e.seat_count AS seats FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id WHERE e.sender='system' ORDER BY e.customer_id'''
rows=nm.query(q)['rows']
prices={
 'E1': [['A',10.0], ['B',18.0], ['C',30.0]],
 'E2': [['A',18.0], ['B',40.0], ['C',70.0]],
 'E3': [['A',25.0], ['B',55.0], ['C',90.0]],
 'D_E02': [['A',15.0], ['B',35.0], ['C',60.0]],
 'D_E09': [['A',18.0], ['B',45.0], ['C',80.0]],
}
deals=[[r['customer_id'], prices.get(r['group_id'], [['A',10.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',45.0]])] for r in rows]
print({'system_latest_threads': len(deals), 'total_seats': sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in rows)})
if deals:
 res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
 print({'sent': sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))})
print(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=59, B=149, C=179))
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(by_group_plan={'S2': {'A': 15.0, 'B': 10.0, 'C': 20.0}}))
print(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=3, B=3, C=4))
print(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=75000, B=250000, C=750000))
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=6))
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=70000, development=0))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 200000, 'S1': 5000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind retention update: S2 C credits are restored, A credits are increased, and support remains focused on reducing open issues without slowing reliability.'))"

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
q='''WITH latest AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) SELECT e.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, e.seat_count AS seats FROM enterprise_turns e JOIN latest l ON e.message_id=l.mid JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=e.customer_id WHERE e.sender='system' ORDER BY e.customer_id'''
rows=nm.query(q)['rows']
prices={
 'E1': [['A',10.0], ['B',18.0], ['C',30.0]],
 'E2': [['A',18.0], ['B',40.0], ['C',70.0]],
 'E3': [['A',25.0], ['B',55.0], ['C',90.0]],
 'D_E02': [['A',15.0], ['B',35.0], ['C',60.0]],
 'D_E09': [['A',18.0], ['B',45.0], ['C',80.0]],
}
deals=[[r['customer_id'], prices.get(r['group_id'], [['A',10.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',45.0]])] for r in rows]
print({'system_latest_threads': len(deals), 'total_seats': sum(r['seats'] or 0 for r in rows)})
if deals:
 res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=deals)
 print({'sent': sum(1 for x in res.get('results',[]) if x.get('success'))})
print(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=59, B=149, C=179))
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(by_group_plan={'S2': {'A': 20.0, 'B': 20.0, 'C': 40.0}}))
print(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=4))
print(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=75000, B=250000, C=750000))
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=5))
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=30000, development=0))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 80000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind retention update: S2 A and C billing credits are increasing again while reliability spend stays focused on the highest-impact support queues.'))"

arguments.cmd:
./novamind-operation python-c "import novamind_api as nm
print(nm.pricing.set_prices(A=59, B=149, C=179))
print(nm.pricing.set_promotion(by_group_plan={'S2': {'A': 0.0, 'B': 0.0, 'C': 0.0}}))
print(nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=1, B=3, C=4))
print(nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=75000, B=250000, C=750000))
print(nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=5))
print(nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=10000, development=0))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={'S2': 20000}))
print(nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={}))
print(nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={}))
print(nm.marketing.post_social_media(content='NovaMind operating update: we are simplifying credits and focusing spend on core service reliability while maintaining high C-plan quality.'))"

*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /modal-volume/saas-bench/codex_agent_runs/run_ec0ced22/agent_workspace/sim_notes.md
@@
 Day 357 / Week 51 observations:
 - Cash recovered to $1.61M under austerity, but subscribers fell to 91,349 after 13,297 cancellations. Open issues fell to 8,710.
 - Active base is almost entirely S2 C (~73.6k) and S2 A (~17.3k). Latest churn is S2 C (7,708) and S2 A (6,574). The A/C credits were probably cut too far.
 - 26 new enterprise leads were reported; send accepted 26 actionable threads. Enterprise remains 0 seats.
 - Week 51 adjustment: deepen S2 credits to A=$20/B=$20/C=$40, keep A2/B3/C4 and large quotas, hold capacity tier 5, set global ops $30k/day and S2 ops $80k/day, keep dev/ad spend at $0.
+
+Day 364 / Week 52 observations:
+- Cash fell to $1.12M and subscribers dropped to 76,141 after 15,398 cancellations. New leads collapsed to 703 and new subscribers to 190. The deeper credits did not stop churn quickly enough.
+- Active base is S2 C (~63.9k), S2 A (~11.7k), and a small B remainder. The remaining goal is cash preservation from the C base.
+- No new enterprise messages. A defensive attempt to send stale system-latest enterprise rows failed before applying settings; reran settings only.
+- Week 52 adjustment: full austerity/harvest mode. Remove S2 credits, drop A to tier 1, keep C tier 4, keep quotas and tier-5 capacity, cut global ops to $10k/day and S2 ops to $20k/day, keep dev/ad spend at $0.
*** End Patch

print(nm.query(q)['rows'])"
